title: BEU B.Tech & B.Arch 2nd Semester Results 2026 (Declared)

detail.title: BEU B.Tech & B.Arch 2nd Semester Results 2026 (Declared)
detail.short_info: BEU B.Tech and B.Arch Result 2026 released online. Check Bihar Engineering University semester exam results and download marksheet at beu-bih.ac.in.

content.text: Bihar Engineering University has declared the B.Tech 2nd Semester and B.Arch 2nd Semester Results 2026 on 13-03-2026. The results belong to the 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Bihar Engineering University exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Bihar Engineering University website at beu-bih.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Bihar Engineering University has published the latest B.Tech and B.Arch 2nd semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

The university has activated the direct link for checking B.Tech and B.Arch 2nd semester results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

rows: Bihar Engineering University B.Tech 2nd Semester Result 2026
Bihar Engineering University B.Arch 2nd Semester Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check BEU Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Bihar Engineering University has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Bihar Engineering University exam portal at beu-bih.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose B.Tech 2nd Semester or B.Arch 2nd Semester from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your Bihar Engineering University result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
